translation: Chen Mou was aware that the account into which the transfer was made belonged to Shi Mou. The bank account transaction records provided could only prove the existence of a transfer but could not demonstrate that it was a mistaken transfer. Under circumstances where Chen Rongping knew that the payee was Shi Shengen yet still chose to initiate the transfer, claiming that the transfer was a "mistaken transfer" is inconsistent with common sense. Moreover, the transfer memo "payment for Lingzhi powder" did not explicitly indicate the nature of the collection on behalf of another. Therefore, the 500,000 yuan involved in the case belongs to Shi Mou and constitutes enforceable property.
